name: k6-sql-coupon-test
description: Fetch coupon codes from SQL Server and run k6 load test

scripts.test: sh -c 'set -a; . ./k6/.env.k6; set +a; k6 run -e TESTNAME='cart-info' -e SV='rkCRM' ./k6/k6-test.js'
scripts.test2: sh -c 'set -a; . ./k6/.env.k6; set +a; k6 run -e TESTNAME='customer-info' -e SV='rkCRM' ./k6/k6-test.js'
scripts.test3: sh -c 'set -a; . ./k6/.env.k6; set +a; k6 run -e TESTNAME='customer-info' -e SV='rkCRM' ./k6/k6-test.js'
scripts.web:install: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run web:backend & npm run web:frontend & wait'
scripts.dev:clean: sh -c 'lsof -tiTCP:8787 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; lsof -tiTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; npm run dev'
